one_time_description: Annual distribution from Trust Fund related to land claims global settlement of $116.8M ratified January 2019
economic_notes: KZA owns Pasahigan Home Center (3183092 Canada Inc.) and Mitigog Forestry Enterprises Inc. (via 4106679 Canada Ltd.) which harvests timber for sale to local mills. Land claims global settlement of $116,801,811 was ratified January 2019; $78,000,000 deposited into KZA Trust Fund. Revolving loans program and CEDO economic development loans program active. Timber sales, sand/gravel sales, maple syrup production, forestry operations (Resolute, RexForet, Sopfeu contracts) noted. 63% of revenue from ISC and federal agencies (69% in 2019).
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 (filed/signed March 12, 2021 due to COVID delays). Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Pasahigan Home Center, 4106679 Canada Ltd., and Mitigog Forestry Enterprises Inc. Seven entities fully consolidated. Large one-time item: $2,438,123 annual distribution from Trust Fund (land claims settlement of $116.8M ratified Jan 2019; $78M deposited to Trust). Restricted cash of $3,732,625 relates to KZA Trust Fund for land claims held in separate account due to qualified community members. Budget figures included but unaudited. Appendices C-N are unaudited supplementary schedules. Multiple contingent liabilities noted including $920M defamation suit (subsequently dismissed Feb 2021, reduced to $100 by plaintiffs). ISC funding 63% of total revenue. Pension expense $811,737. Total revenue on consolidated statement of operations includes internal revenues eliminated of $1,597,643; net revenue after eliminations = $34,517,848 - internal eliminations already netted. total_government_transfers estimated from named government sources: ISC $17,333,481 + Health Canada $4,451,285 + CMHC $130,973 + AFNQL $702,029 + Min Finances QC $573,790 + Min Famille $419,293 + FNEC $1,258,809 + Solicitor General $638,700 = $27,508,360 less internal eliminations portion; used sum of identifiable government lines = $25,508,360 adjusted; reported as sum of all named government transfer lines pre-elimination. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text.
